title: clinopodium vulgare subsp. villosum
intro: Clinopodium vulgare subsp. villosum, also known as Woolly Calamint, is a subspecies of the Clinopodium vulgare plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium vulgare subsp. villosum include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and colds. Clinopodium vulgare subsp. villosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
